---
title: Project config
description: Project config commands for the Retask CLI.
---

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED from `retask help-llm`. Do not edit by hand; run `yarn gen:cli`. -->
## `retask project-config get`

Get Retask project config (statuses, types, kanban)

```bash
retask project-config get <project-id>
```

## `retask project-config set`

Update Retask project config

**Flags:** `--task-statuses`, `--task-types`, `--default-view`

```bash
retask project-config set <project-id> --default-view TASK_VIEW_KANBAN
```
